name: BTC Digital Ltd.
summary: PART I Overview and Recent Developments Through the operating entities, we are a crypto asset technology company based in the U.S. with a focus on bitcoin mining. We also generate revenue through mining machines resale and rental business operations. For the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023, we generated a substantial majority of our revenue from bitcoin mining.
